title: 日本ダービーの後に・昇り炎舞

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's down to the final stretch! The racers pick up
the pace in a bid to win the title of Derby
champion!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Bring it on!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I won't let you beat me! The Derby is mine!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
No way! I won't give up! I'm winning this for
Maruzen!

text_block_list.name: Ardan & Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
Aaaaahhh!
Raaaaagh!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: (...I'm going to lose. I'm being overpowered!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I don't care if my legs shatter! I will burn out my
very lifeforce! And that light will serve as proof
that I was alive!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text:
No, no, no, no, nooo! The Derby's mine! It's
miiiiine!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
(...No! Losing is not an option. I will not...
abiiide... defeeeat!)

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
THE STRONGEEEST! THEEERE! IIIIIS!
RAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's pulled ahead of the pack and powers
straight to the finish line! The title of Derby
champion this year goes to—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Amazing... Wow, my heart's still racing!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Thank you, Chiyo. Thank you, everybody. What
an incredible Derby!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff, huff... Sniffle...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I lost, Maruzen... I lost our Derby...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Sob... Waaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: In that moment... I...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text: You were so intense, Yaeno! I had goosebumps!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, what a great race! It felt like you were all
duking it out with your very souls!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...R-really?!

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text: It was definitely one for the record books!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...Much obliged!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Chiyono O... Ardan...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Ah... Yaeno.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I would like to express my gratitude to the both
of you.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: But what for?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It was your incredible passion that drew today's
performance out of me.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I didn't want to be outdone... I wanted to light my
soul ablaze and burn just as brightly as you two.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: Are you saying that we were visibly glowing?

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: In my eyes, you certainly were.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Your very souls were aglow, lit by your
determination to claim victory no matter the cost.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I was entranced by the way you ran.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: My! Is that so...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text:
I may not have claimed the achievement I so
ardently wanted, but it appears I still managed to
leave proof of my existence...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I certainly think so. Your brilliant image is deeply
burned onto my heart.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: I sure hope Maruzen feels the same way...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: From the way she's smiling, I'm sure she does.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: ...Yeah!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Chiyono O. Ardan. Thank you both for showing
me such fierce determination.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: Thank you too, Yaeno.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Chiyono O
text_block_list.text: But I'm going to come out on top next time!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ardan
text_block_list.text: I shall seize victory no matter what!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Do not think I shall yield so easily!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Laughing mirthfully, the three shake hands. But in
stark contrast...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Yaeno Muteki's expression is meek when she
returns to the waiting room. There's no trace of
her smile from the turf.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I have to reflect on my shameful behavior. I made
a grave mistake which cannot be ignored.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I let my emotions get the better of me near the
end of the race, and ran to the whims of my own
competitive drive.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
The powerful cries Chiyono O and Ardan let out
from deep within their souls overwhelmed me and
stole away my reason...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
It was as if I was hearing my own impending
defeat.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But in that same instant, the fierce blaze within
me cried out. They refused to take defeat lying
down and urged me to fight back!

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
My blood started boiling, and I became furious. I
tried to stop my rampaging legs, but to no avail.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: ...I was on the verge of losing control.
choice_data_list:
But you were able to put up a great fight
because of that.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: I agree. And I am satisfied with today's results.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I had an incredible race with Chiyono O and
Ardan, and I was able to run at my very best.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Indeed, it was the very best that I can do
currently. But...

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Had I not let loose my emotions, I would have
been left behind with no hope of fighting for the
lead.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
My lack of strength and inexperience are to
blame, and that must not be overlooked.
choice_data_list: Well, sometimes it's a matter of will.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Close matches between racers of equal prowess
are oftentimes won by whoever has greater
willpower.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Today's race was one such instance. As such, I tell
her there's no need to feel discouraged.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
But... I cannot guarantee that I won't lose control
if I find myself in the same circumstances again.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
Justifying such a volatile running style would be
irresponsible...
choice_data_list:
We'll just have to hone your ability to wield
both blaze fierce and water still.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
By improving her running ability and strategy, she
should be able to win without letting her
emotions run rampant.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Very well. I agree that's our best approach.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: Phew... I'm relieved we're in accord.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
I'll be counting on you to help me deliver a stable
performance at the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's highly likely that Sakura Chiyono O and
Mejiro Ardan will be at the Kikuka Sho, given
that it's the final race in the Classic Triple Crown.
choice_data_list: I think you'll be in for another tough battle.
I think you'll be in for another tough battle.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text: As do I. But I'm also looking forward to it.

text_block_list.name: Yaeno Muteki
text_block_list.text:
For it will be my chance to have an even greater
battle against Chiyono O and Ardan!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's clear from her smile that Yaeno Muteki has a
burning desire to reach even greater heights with
her rivals at the Kikuka Sho.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: However, a few days later...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We receive unexpected news that Sakura
Chiyono O and Mejiro Ardan will both be taking
time off from racing due to injuries.
